text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 240 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Split Network Standard Retail — Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a three-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage
